TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tyrone_Britt, title = Tyrone_Britt, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tyrone_Britt} }

S.FORM: Tyrone Britt sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 4, Tyrone Britt, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Tyrone Britt sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 4, Tyrone Britt, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: tjrone βritt s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, tjrone βritt, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
